LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Food.descript: Call for Bruderschaft des Stahls food supplies.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Food.label: BoS Food Drop
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Tech_Resource: Call for Bruderschaft des Stahls technical resources and components.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Uniforms.desc: Call for Bruderschaft des Stahls standard uniforms.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Weapons.descr: Call for Bruderschaft des Stahls standard issue weapons.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Weapons.label: BoS-Waffenabwurf
